---
title: "test_security_scan_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_security_scan_empire.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.13
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.83
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_security_scanner_dangerous_code, test_security_scanner_obfuscation.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test_security_scanner_dangerous_code and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.security_scan](file://src.tools.security_scan)

### Exports
- `test_security_scanner_dangerous_code`
- `test_security_scanner_obfuscation`
- `test_security_scanner_safe`
